text: Handling deadlines is a crucial skill in both work and study. Good time management helps you break big tasks into smaller, manageable parts. It is also important to prioritize—decide which tasks are most urgent and focus on them first. You should also practice scope management: if a project grows too large, consider reducing less important details to stay on track. Finally, always communicate early if you face difficulties; letting others know in advance allows for adjustments and support. With these strategies, you can reduce stress and complete your work on time.
